title: DO NOT MERGE: Log response headers on a failure to read layer blob
body:
This **modifies `vendor`** to log the headers of a response, to help with debugging.

Absolutely untested to this point.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
DO NOT MERGE THIS
```

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mtrmac* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mtrmac] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Is [this](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5397882786807808/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-host.log.html) what you were hoping for?

Yup! (A lazy way to re-format it is to paste the string into something like https://go.dev/play/p/dohtCQbM-23 .)
Or `xsel -o | sed -e 's/\\r\\n/\n /g'  | xsel -i`. Sorry, I will be more courteous next time.
Oh no, that was in no way meant as a complaint about the comment.
I didn't interpret it as such! (neither complaint nor gripe). I interpreted it as a way for me to do better next time! The output you pasted in chat was soooooo much friendlier to read!

A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
@mtrmac, are you still using this PR?
The debugging effort has stalled; I suppose this can be recreated any time…
